entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS062) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. 2. TO ADD INTERNET CONNECT SERVICE TO THE INCIDENT RESPONSE SERVICE (INRS). 3. TO ADD FOUR NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. 4. TO ADD 36 NEW SEDS FOR UNIFIED MESSAGING SERVICE (UMS). 5. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR UMS. 6. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED. 7. TO REVISE THE DMRC TERM FOR 19 SEDS. 8. TO CORRECT THE PART NUMBER AND ITEM DESCRIPTION FOR ONE SED. 9. TO ADD TWO NEW SEDS FOR MFS. 10. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. 11. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS063) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
UPDATE B.2.5.1.2 UNDER SECTION B TO ADD THE FOLLOWING PARAGRAPH:
FOR E1 AND E3 CIRCUITS BETWEEN A DOMESTIC REGION AND A NON-DOMESTIC REGION, THE FOLLOWING INSTRUCTIONS SHALL APPLY. THE DOMESTIC PORTION OF THE E1 OR E3 CIRCUIT BETWEEN THE POP AND THE GATEWAY, SHALL ALSO BE AN E1 OR E3 RESPECTIVELY. AS NOTED IN TABLE B.2.5.1.2-1, THIS PORTION OF THE CIRCUIT IS PRICED USING TABLE B.2.5.1.2-2. THEREFORE, IN ORDER TO PROVIDE AN E1 OR E3 CIRCUIT BETWEEN A DOMESTIC AND NON-DOMESTIC REGION, THE PRICE FOR THE DOMESTIC PORTION OF THE E1 AND E3 SHALL BE IN TABLE B.2.5.1.2-2. THIS PRICE, HOWEVER, IS ONLY APPLICABLE BETWEEN A POP AND THE GATEWAY, AND DOES NOT APPLY BETWEEN TWO POPS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS064) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1.TO ADD FEATURES TO L2VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON MARCH 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0336.01E. EXCLUDED FROM THE AWARD OF THIS SUBMITTAL IS THE TABLE OF CONTENTS FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME. 2.FOR ANY TEXT FILES INCLUDED IN THIS MODIFICATION, THE LINE IN THE HEADER MOD #-TBD/EFFECTIVE-TBD IS REPLACED WITH MOD PS064/ WITH THE DATE FROM BLOCK 16C OF PAGE 1 OF THIS MODIFICATION ADDED. THE PORTION OF THE FOOTER REFERENCING THE SUBMITTAL NUMBER IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH MOD PS064 . 3.ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 4.ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. 5.THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS065) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO REMOVE THE PHYSICAL ADDRESS OF SITE FIELDS AND FOOTNOTES FROM THE FOLLOWING TABLES IN SECTION B: TABLE B.2.13.2.2-3 DOMESTIC WLNAS BY NETWORK SITE CODE MRC EXCEPTION PRICES TABLE B.2.13.3.1-3 DOMESTIC BROADBAND DSL ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE EXCEPTION PRICES TABLE B.3.1-3 DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE MRC EXCEPTION PRICES TABLE B.3.2.1-3 DOMESTIC BROADBAND DSL ACCESS BY NETWORK SITE CODE EXCEPTION PRICES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS066) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD MULTIPLE SERVICES FOR DEDICATED HOSTING SERVICE (DHS), STORAGE SERVICES (SS) AND MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON APRIL 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0355.01E. EXCLUDED FROM THE AWARD OF THIS SUBMITTAL IS THE TABLE OF CONTENTS FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME. 2. TO ADD 10 SEDS, PREVIOUSLY DELETED IN MODIFICATION PS055. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0357.01E. 3. TO ADD FOUR NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0358.01E. 4. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 21, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0359.01E. 5. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON APRIL 21, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0360.01E. 6. TO ADD ONE NEW SED AND ONE NEW DISCOUNT CLASS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0366.01E. 7. TO CHANGE THE DMRC TERM FOR ONE SED. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0367.01E. 8. TO REDUCE CERTAIN DHS PRICES AND TO EXTEND THE END DATE ON THREE OTHER DHS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0368.01P. 9. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR ONE SED. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0370.01P. 10. TO ADD NINE NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0371.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS067) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD NON-DOMESTIC NBIP-VPNS PORTS. 2. TO ADD 623 NETWORX SITE CODE BASED WIRELINE ACCESS PRICES. 3. TO ADD T1X2 DOMESTIC WIRELESS ACCESS PRICES. 4. TO ADD 17 NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 5. TO ADD 23 NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 6. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 7. TO ADD OC12 SERVICE TO TWO POPS. 8. TO ADD AN AUDIO CONFERENCE FEATURE. 9. TO CHANGE THE DMRC TERM FOR ONE SED. 10. TO ADD ONE NEW SED TO SUPPORT PLS. 11. TO REMOVE OBSOLETE WIRELINE SEDS. 12. TO ADD NEW IPS ETHERNET PORT AND OVERAGE CLINS FOR THE HI CAP FLEX OPTION. 13. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 14. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS. 15. TO REDUCE ONE CPCS PRICE. 16. TO ADD CRITICAL NBIP-VPNS PORTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS069) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD 34 NETWORX SITE CODE (NSC) SPECIFIC ACCESS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0385.01E. 2. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0387.01E. 3. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0388.02E. 4. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0389.01E. 5. TO REDUCE CERTAIN SEDS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0390.01P. 6. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0391.01E. 7. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 18, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0392.01E. 8. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 25, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0394.01E. 9. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 30, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0395.01E. 10. TO ADD TWO NEW SERVING WIRE CENTERS (SWCS) TO THE CONTRACT. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 1, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0396.01E. 11. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 6, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0397.01E. 12. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0398.01E. 13. TO REDUCE CERTAIN MTIPS PORT PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0401.01P. 14. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 15. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. 16. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS070) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR ROUTINE AND CRITICAL OC3C AND OC12C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0386.02E. 2. TO ADD A SED FOR PLS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 21, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0402.02E. 3. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 22, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0404.01E. 4. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0405.01E. 5. TO ADD NETWORX SITE CODE SPECIFIC ACCESS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0407.01E. 6. TO ADD 23 SEDS FOR IPTELS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0408.01E. 7. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR ROUTINE OC3 ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0411.01E. 8. TO ADD NEW PORT PRICING AND OVERAGE PRICES TO THE IPS SERVICE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 3, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0413.01E. 9. TO REDUCE THE PRICES OF CERTAIN SEDS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0415.01P. 10. TO ADD 14 SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AE0416.01E. 11. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 12. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. 13. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
